steps.title: Test the point
steps.content:
A solution must satisfy both inequalities. Substitute $(12,0)$ into the system because that point is one of the choices.
$$0\le 12+4$$
$$0\ge -2(12)-6$$

steps.title: Check both inequalities
steps.content:
Both statements are true, so the point lies in the solution region for the system.
$$0\le 16$$
$$0\ge -30$$
The answer is D.
